title: [FIRRTL] Can't Parse Regreset w/ Self Connection
body:
The parser is rejecting the following:

``` firrtl
circuit Foo:
  public module Foo:
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : AsyncReset
    output z : UInt<1>
    regreset r : UInt<1>, clock, reset, r
    connect r, UInt(0)
    connect z, r
```

This errors with `firtool -ir-fir`:

```
Qux.fir:9:41: error: use of unknown declaration 'r'
    regreset r : UInt<1>, clock, reset, r
                                        ^
```

This is accepted if it's using the legacy pre 3.0 syntax:

``` firrtl
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo:
  public module Foo:
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : AsyncReset
    output z : UInt<1>
    reg r : UInt<1>, clock with : (reset => (reset, r))
    connect r, UInt(0)
    connect z, r
```
